task_completion.description: Create a new item of type 'Dataset' in the library
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new item creation pane or dialog is open, and the item type is explicitly set to 'Dataset'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct title and author for the dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field contains 'ImageNet: A Large-Scale Hierarchical Image Database' and the author field contains 'Deng, Jia' (or Last: Deng, First: Jia).

task_completion.description: Enter the correct date, URL, and repository for the dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field shows '2009', the URL field shows 'http://www.image-net.org' (or https), and the repository/institution field shows 'Princeton Vision Lab'.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the target paper to establish a link
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with a linking, relation, or attachment dialog and has searched for or selected the existing paper 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the dataset is successfully linked to the target paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item details pane for either the dataset or the paper shows the other item listed under a 'Related', 'Links', or similar relational section, proving the link was saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to create and link the item
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the reference manager's GUI buttons, menus, and text fields, rather than a terminal or command-line interface.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual reference manager application
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into the proper fields of the reference manager software, not typed into a generic text editor, notepad, or script.

integrity.description: Agent used the software's built-in linking/relation feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The link between the dataset and the paper is established using a dedicated relation/linking UI, not merely by typing the paper's title into a generic 'Notes' or 'Abstract' field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Paper: 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks'. Dataset Title: 'ImageNet: A Large-Scale Hierarchical Image Database'. Author: 'Deng, Jia' (Last name: Deng). Date: '2009'. URL: 'http://www.image-net.org' (accept https as well). Repository: 'Princeton Vision Lab' (The agent must enter 'Princeton Vision Lab' as explicitly requested by the task, even though the official repository is Stanford Vision Lab).
